name: button
title: Button
description: Initiates an immediate action. Native <button> with accessible loading state, five variants, and 44px minimum target size.
useWhen: Triggering an in-page action (open dialog, add row, start upload)
avoidWhen: Navigating to another page (use a link)
Toggling a persistent on/off state (use a switch)

keyboard: Tab moves focus to the button
While loading, the button stays focusable but activation is suppressed (aria-busy + aria-disabled)
